title: 남자친구가 전여친 이름을 불렀어요 어떡하죠?
text:
rtner with no taste in food (Tablo, Tukutz)]
Man, this one's pretty easy I'm the type who usually doesn't put any thought into meals and just goes to a place nearby But now that I'm married, whenever we eat, I consider various things before choosing a restaurant And the success rate is so much higher now I think that's the way to go For me, I don't care if you take me to a trendy place with a line every date, or if you don't react when I buy you nice food None of that matters. Just I just wish they would stop asking me what I want to eat [TN: Seems this one comes from a place of deep trauma]
Seriously, that [TN: Seems this one comes from a place of deep trauma]
"What should we eat today?" Ugh~ That pretense of giving you a choice LOL I seriously "What should we have for lunch today?" That's not a question, it's a quiz I'm not talking about Hyejung No, but seriously, for all you couples out there, let me, uh speak as an adult with some real-world experience Oh, come on! / The adult is speaking You sound like such an old man Wow~~~! That "What do you want to eat today?" Don't ask it Just say, "Let's eat this" Let's just do that from now on Just pick something and say it Why, from 3 PM do I have to start thinking about "what should we have for dinner?" Why do I have to suffer for three hours? LOL Sounds like you've been burned a lot No I told you, it's not about me Alright, let's move on Sounds Sounds like Sounds like my Sounds like my story Sounds like my story~🎶 [TN: Relationship Advice Center 2 Is Now Open!]
Okay~ [TN: Relationship Advice Center 2 Is Now Open!]

Ugh What do I do about my fatty liver? (Relatable) What do I do about my uric acid levels? and my uric acid levels shot up See everyone? These are the kinds of worries we have “I wish that person liked me as much as I like them.” I want to have those

Filtering out the good guys it's really hard until you've actually experienced it First off, what kind of guy should you avoid? A guy to avoid? For example, suddenly— calling you by an ex’s name [TN: BRB] It's a little hard to say because unless he's a criminal, the standard for a ‘good person’ differs Someone who's good for me and someone who's just generically "a good person" are different And even with a record, it depends on what kind He stole bread because he was starving Jean Valjean? Jean Valjean is understandable Hey, but have you seen the bread Jean Valjean stole? It’s like this big It was big enough to feed the entire village This is important Is he a person who treats his partner well, or there are guys who treat everyone well except for their partner That guy's a no-go He might be a good person, but that doesn't necessarily mean he's a good person for me She specifically asked for the traits of a good man, from a father's perspective I think it's best to avoid a guy like that Like, when a problem comes up, for example, he needs to ask for something But he can't ask for it himself, Ah~ and sort of he's like, "What do I do what do I do," and wants his girlfriend to say it for him Like, they can't ask for a refund or things like that There's that type, and then there's the complete opposite type The guy who's too forward Ah, too nosy / Yeah, yeah Those two types. The two extremes You should avoid those Avoid them Two things just popped into my head Types of guys to filter out One is, when you go to a restaurant or a cafe, guys who are rude to the staff You have to filter them out, no matter what Ah, those types forget dating, even as a friend That's always been one of our standards That's why when you're getting to know someone, it's good to go on a

a cafe, guys who are rude to the staff You have to filter them out, no matter what Ah, those types forget dating, even as a friend That's always been one of our standards That's why when you're getting to know someone, it's good to go on a date to a place like a restaurant They say you can see a person's true character there Yeah, how they treat other people How they act toward the person clearing the table You get to see all that And another one is, let's say he smokes Don't date guys who spit while smoking Pfft No, why on earth do you spit while you're smoking? I seriously don't get it And everyone does it, from their twenties to their fifties What if they're a couple that spits together? Then they're a perfect match (Problem solved) There's this, too A guy with too much self-love Mhm A man who loves himself too much. VS
A partner who is friends with their ex] Ahh~ Which of the two is better? A partner who stays friends with their ex~? I think a partner who stays friends with their ex would be better Why? They've already been in love, broken up mutually, and are now friends So I'd assume they've completely let go of any lingering feelings But feelings could come back But friends who known each other for over 20 years, like from kindergarten You know, opposite sex friends In this case, it's overwhelmingly likely the guy friend has a secret crush LOL Why? It's very high! You're an old-timer who thinks men and women can't be friends You're an old-timer, too LOL Yeah, if we're being technical, I'm more of an old-timer than you Yeah, you’re older Yeah, but Ancient (Hurt) What the hell, you &*^S [TN: Hang on, we're gonna go fight again] So then a guy can he only be friends with guys? No, that's not it But a guy and a girl This dude senses he's about to be canceled (Shakes head) A guy and a girl can be friends But a guy and a girl maintaining a friendship for a long time in my opinion, 99.9% of the time, one of them has a secret crush Someone likes the other~ One of them Otherwise, (Whip) it's unnecessary!
